<var>
$DPS$ = (Damage * Burst Count)  / (Cooldown + (Firerate * Burst Count))
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 400; 100; 700; 1850; 6000
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 450; 200; 800; 3000; 8000
$FSE-DETECTION$ = 2; ; 4
$FSE-PVP-DETECTION$ = 2; ; 0
$FSE-UPGRADE$ = Barracks Training; Better Aiming; Equipment Upgrades; Deadliest Soldier
$FSE-PVP-UPGRADE$ = Better Vision; Better Aiming; Equipment Upgrades; Deadliest Soldier
$FSE-UPGRADEICON$ = 5523192002; 5523193619; 5523195646; 5523196519
$FSE-CATEGORY$ = Starter
$FREF$ = <ref name=firerate>Firerate only applies to the burst and is not the time between bursts.</ref>
$DREF$ = <ref name=dps>Calculated as (Damage × Burst Count) ÷ (Cooldown + (Firerate × Burst Count)).</ref>
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Burst Count !! Firerate$FREF$ !! Cooldown !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 3 || 0.175 || 0.5 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 3 || 0.15 || 0.4 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 4 || 0.15 || 0.4 || 19 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 8 || 0.15 || 0.4 || 19 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 12 || 0.15 || 0.4 || 22 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Burst Count !! Firerate$FREF$ !! Cooldown !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 4 || 0.15 || 0.4 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 6 || 0.125 || 0.3 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 6 || 0.125 || 0.3 || 19 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 8 || 0.125 || 0.3 || 21 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 10 || 0.1 || 0.2 || 21 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
